name: vox-rough-notation
title: Vox Rough Notation
description: Hand-drawn word annotations absorbed from @remotion/rough-notation as pure HyperFrames code: seeded sketchy strokes + dashoffset draw-on, seek-safe, zero deps. Seven types (circle, underline, box, highlight, strike, crossed-off, bracket) with the roughnotation.com palette; highlight paints under the ink.
